summary: Tested all 4 new features: (1) personalization-stats API returns 'Meister loves Jerky' — PASS; (2) Paperwork mobile 2-column grid for MiraImaginesCards — PASS; (3) SoulBuilder life_vision question + (4) placeholder prop support — FAIL due to changes being applied to wrong file (SoulBuilder.jsx instead of PetSoulOnboarding.jsx which is the actual /soul-builder route component).

ui_bugs.issue: life_vision question ('In one sentence, what kind of life do you want for {pet}?') with placeholder 'e.g. A life full of adventure, love and salmon treats...' was added to SoulBuilder.jsx (line 228-231) BUT the /soul-builder route actually renders PetSoulOnboarding.jsx (confirmed via App.js line 446). PetSoulOnboarding.jsx Long Horizon chapter has NO life_vision question — it ends with 'goals' question. The chapter confirmation text 'Beautiful. Everything Mira does for {pet} will be guided by this.' also CANNOT be verified.

Placeholder prop support was added to SoulBuilder.jsx (line 1965: placeholder={question.placeholder || ...}) but this is in the unused file. PetSoulOnboarding.jsx has its own textarea rendering code that also needs updating.

action_items: CRITICAL: The /soul-builder route uses PetSoulOnboarding.jsx (NOT SoulBuilder.jsx). App.js line 446: `<Route path='/soul-builder' element={<ProtectedRoute><PetSoulOnboarding /></ProtectedRoute>} />`. The life_vision question must be added to PetSoulOnboarding.jsx's Long Horizon chapter (id:'horizon', around line 688), AFTER the 'goals' question.

Add life_vision question to PetSoulOnboarding.jsx Long Horizon chapter: { key: 'life_vision', pts: 8 (or appropriate), text: 'In one sentence, what kind of life do you want for {name}?', placeholder: 'e.g. A life full of adventure, love and salmon treats...', type: 'text', mira: '...' }
Add placeholder prop support to PetSoulOnboarding.jsx's text question textarea rendering — check how text type questions are rendered (search for type === 'text' in PetSoulOnboarding.jsx)
Add chapter confirmation text 'Beautiful. Everything Mira does for {name} will be guided by this.' to PetSoulOnboarding.jsx Long Horizon chapter
critical_code_review_comments: SoulBuilder.jsx is DEAD CODE — it exports a SoulBuilder component but is not imported or used by any route in App.js. The /soul-builder and /onboarding routes both use PetSoulOnboarding.jsx which has its own complete implementation. Consider removing SoulBuilder.jsx to avoid confusion.
PetSoulOnboarding.jsx is 1398 lines — approaching the 700-line guideline threshold for splitting

success_rate.frontend: 33% (1/3 testable features pass — paperwork grid passes, life_vision and placeholder fail due to wrong file)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 1. Backend personalization-stats fix is WORKING — /api/mira/personalization-stats/pet-meister-0faaab39 returns 'Meister loves Jerky' in knowledge_items. 2. Paperwork mobile 2-column grid is WORKING — confirmed via grid computed style '173px 173px' with 2 MiraImaginesCards side by side at 390px viewport. 3. CRITICAL: SoulBuilder life_vision question was added to SoulBuilder.jsx (lines 228-231) but /soul-builder route uses PetSoulOnboarding.jsx. Main agent must add life_vision to PetSoulOnboarding.jsx Long Horizon chapter. 4. SoulKnowledgeTicker backend API confirmed working via curl/pytest.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: E1 applied changes to SoulBuilder.jsx (lines 228-231, 1963) but this component is DEAD CODE — not imported or used by any React route. App.js line 446 maps /soul-builder to PetSoulOnboarding.jsx. PetSoulOnboarding.jsx (the actual Soul Builder) has its own independent CHAPTERS definition and Long Horizon chapter ending with 'goals' (line 676-688), with NO life_vision question.
rca_of_issue.reproduction_steps: 1. Navigate to https://pet-soul-ranking.preview.emergentagent.com/soul-builder → uses PetSoulOnboarding component. 2. Click Let's begin → navigate 7 chapters → Long Horizon chapter. 3. Questions shown: birthday_quarter, health_conditions, insurance, adoption_story, goals — NO life_vision. 4. Grep for life_vision in PetSoulOnboarding.jsx returns nothing.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Add life_vision as last question in PetSoulOnboarding.jsx Long Horizon chapter (around line 688) with proper pts, text, placeholder, and mira hint fields.
